title: retron client
description: A client side mod that customizes the look and feel of the game, while adding useful client-side features.
body:
# retron client
![Available on Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)![Requires Fabric API](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)![Requires Cloth Config API](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/cloth-config-api_vector.svg)![Won't Support Mod Menu](https://retronbv.github.io/badges/modmenu-unsupported.svg)

This mod customizes the look and feel of the game, while adding useful client-side features.

## Features:
### Improved Pause Menu

<details>
<summary>Image</summary>

![Improved Pause Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I0VKwo72/images/835b1ed01fd17f19b6b54ad987420c239f0aa208.png)

</details>


### In-Game Gamemode Switcher

<details>
<summary>Image</summary>

![In-Game Gamemode Switcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I0VKwo72/images/b30f5de87b83861790dd2056493a2cbc3a9dcf1b.png)

</details>


### Mods Menu

<details>
<summary>Image</summary>

![Mods Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I0VKwo72/images/bce6c9e0689882c76b3c18aa422792d29e64f476.png)

</details>


### Coordinate & FPS Displays

<details>
<summary>Image</summary>

![Coordinate & FPS Displays](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I0VKwo72/images/91118abc4246c385f82b59f8bae682f825770df6.png)

</details>


### Armor Display

<details>
<summary>Image</summary>

![Armor Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I0VKwo72/images/93941780b6989597704c0f56f0337e0376bd89f3.png)

</details>

### _& Much More..._
